biocontainers.name: transdecoder
biocontainers.summary: Transdecoder identifies candidate coding regions within transcript sequences, such as those generated by de novo rna-seq transcript assembly using trinity, or constructed based on rna-seq alignments to the genome using tophat and cufflinks.

biotools.summary: TransDecoder identifies candidate coding regions within transcript sequences, such as those generated by de novo RNA-Seq transcript assembly using Trinity, or constructed based on RNA-Seq alignments to the genome using Tophat and Cufflinks.

galaxy.summary: TransDecoder finds coding regions within transcripts
galaxy.bio_tools_summary: TransDecoder identifies candidate coding regions within transcript sequences, such as those generated by de novo RNA-Seq transcript assembly using Trinity, or constructed based on RNA-Seq alignments to the genome using Tophat and Cufflinks.
